title: BRAEMAR WEEKLY DRY BULK REPORT
summary:
Main
By Mark Nugent
Growth slowing across all sectors
Vessel ordering in the dry bulk market has maintained its subdued nature throughout the year as freight rates have weakened and uncertainty over future regulation persists. We go through our latest supply-side forecast . 2022 setting the tone
Ordering this year has naturally slowed down as the freight market softened throughout the year.
